calendar.matters: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Plaintiffs Request For Oral Prove-Up Hearing

Plaintiffs Request For Oral Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-12-2026 Continued To Aug-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:44am and concluding at 9:48am.

Plaintiff Mercury Insurance Company appearing represented by Erin Peikes, Esq. via zoom
Defendant Carlos Vasquez-Morales not appearing.

As Ms. Peikes is an employee of Mercury Insurance Company, she is deemed a person most knowledgeable and a witness is not necessary.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

After review of the pleadings and testimony on this matter, the Court is in need of a supplemental declaration from the custodian of records regarding Mercury Insurance's investigation of the uninsured motorist.

This needs to be filed ahead of the next hearing.

This matter is continued to August 7, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.
